sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الْعَمَلُ الْجَمَاعِيُّ الْفَعَّالُ حَجَرَ الزَّاوِيَةِ فِي أَيِّ مُؤَسَّسَةٍ نَاجِحَةٍ، حَيْثُ يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ وُجُهَاتِ نَظَرٍ مُتَنَوِّعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Efikasan timski rad smatra se kamenom temeljcem svake uspješne organizacije, jer spaja različite perspektive.
sentences.translationEn: Effective teamwork is considered the cornerstone of any successful organization, as it combines diverse perspectives.

sentences.arabic: يَضْمَنُ التَّوَاصُلُ الْمَفْتُوحُ بَيْنَ أَعْضَاءِ الْفَرِيقِ أَنَّ الْجَمِيعَ يَعْمَلُونَ بِمَا يَتَمَاشَى مَعَ الْأَهْدَافِ الرَّئِيسِيَّةِ لِلْمَشْرُوعِ.
sentences.translation: Otvorena komunikacija među članovima tima osigurava da svi rade u skladu s glavnim ciljevima projekta.
sentences.translationEn: Open communication among team members ensures that everyone is working in line with the project's primary objectives.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يُشَارِكُ الْأَفْرَادُ خِبْرَاتِهِمْ بِسَخَاءٍ، تَسْتَفِيدُ الْمَجْمُوعَةُ بِأَكْمَلِهَا مِنَ الْمَعْرِفَةِ الْجَمَاعِيَّةِ وَالْكَفَاءَةِ الْمُحَسَّنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kada pojedinci velikodušno dijele svoja iskustva, cijela grupa ima koristi od kolektivnog znanja i poboljšane efikasnosti.
sentences.translationEn: When individuals generously share their expertise, the entire group benefits from collective knowledge and improved efficiency.

sentences.arabic: قَدْ تَنْشَأُ النِّزَاعَاتُ أَحْيَانًا، لَكِنَّ مُعَالَجَتَهَا مِنْ خِلَالِ الْحِوَارِ الْبَنَّاءِ تُقَوِّي الْعَلَاقَاتِ الْمِهَنِيَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Sukobi se ponekad mogu pojaviti, ali njihovo rješavanje kroz konstruktivan dijalog jača profesionalne odnose.
sentences.translationEn: Conflicts may occasionally arise, but addressing them through constructive dialogue strengthens professional relationships.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاحْتِرَامَ الْمُتَبَادَلَ وَالثِّقَةَ هُمَا الْأَسَاسَانِ اللَّذَانِ تُبْنَى عَلَيْهِمَا بِيئَةُ عَمَلٍ تَعَاوُنِيَّةٌ وَمُبْتَكِرَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Međusobno poštovanje i povjerenje su temelji na kojima se gradi kolaborativno i inovativno radno okruženje.
sentences.translationEn: Mutual respect and trust are the foundations upon which a collaborative and innovative work environment is built.
